summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of Neural Network Builder training features. All core training functionality is working including TensorFlow.js browser-based training, data loading tabs, sample data generation, training configuration controls, and training execution.

integration_issues.issue: Input shape mismatch error when model architecture doesn't match sample data dimensions
integration_issues.description: Expected behavior - shows proper error handling when tensor shapes don't align

passed_tests: Click Train button opens training panel successfully
Training panel has CSV, Images, Sample tabs - all functional
Training config sliders work (epochs, batch size, learning rate)
Optimizer dropdown works - successfully changed from Adam to SGD
Start Training button enabled after data is loaded
Drag and drop layer functionality works
Layer count updates correctly (3 layers added)
All tab navigation works (CSV, Images, Sample)
